business_definition: Consolidated trading revenue including realized P&L and approved accrual adjustments
certification_reason: Certified after monthly close alignment and sign-off

business_definition: Trading revenue excluding non-recurring valuation and reserve items
certification_reason: Adjustment policy approved in SteerCo and embedded in close book

business_definition: Accounts qualifying as wholesale under agreed operating and regulatory rules
certification_reason: Definition changed in SteerCo; rule engine still being aligned

business_definition: Revenue used in external reporting submissions after regulatory exclusions
certification_reason: External adjustments are documented but not yet fully automated

business_definition: High-quality liquid assets divided by 30-day stressed outflows
certification_reason: Treasury and regulatory reporting aligned on stressed outflow assumptions

business_definition: Interest earned less interest expense on managed balance sheet positions
certification_reason: Accrual timing approved by finance policy

business_definition: Fee income generated from cash management and trade finance services
certification_reason: Mapped to product taxonomy and validated at source

business_definition: Internal transfer pricing applied to balance sheet funding
RWA amount used for capital and regulatory reporting
certification_reason: Two model vintages still active across legal entities

business_definition: One-day 99% VaR based on approved market risk methodology
Share of daily PnL explained by approved risk factors
Count of failed settlements not resolved by T+2
certification_reason: Standardized event status and aging rules

business_definition: Open unmatched balances across GL and subledgers above threshold
certification_reason: Tolerance and aging thresholds differ across teams

business_definition: Count of manual journals and top-side adjustments booked during close
certification_reason: Controller-approved population and attestation in place

business_definition: Outstanding nostro reconciliation exceptions over threshold
certification_reason: Source enrichment from APAC not yet complete
